user.title: RF Fan - Device Setup
user.description: Choose the ESPHome RF gateway and basic fan capabilities. Compatible ESPHome devices found: {detected}.

data.has_fan_on: Fan has a dedicated on button

method.title: RF Fan - Setup Method
method.description: Choose manual entry or guided learning from remote button presses.

data_description.method: Manual entry: paste the codes yourself. Guided learning: capture them from remote button presses.

learn.title: RF Fan - Guided Learning
learn.description: Listening for action {action}. Press and briefly hold the corresponding remote button within {timeout} seconds, or paste the code manually if needed.

learn_resolve.title: RF Fan - Guided Learning
learn_resolve.description: No RF signal was captured for action {action}. Paste the code manually, tick skip, or submit to listen again ({timeout}s).

codes.title: RF Fan - Action Codes
codes.description: Paste the RF code for each action. Codes are opaque strings, exactly as produced by your sniffing pipeline.

reconfigure.title: RF Fan - Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Re-declare the fan capabilities. Existing codes are kept; only newly required buttons are learned next.

data.has_fan_on: Fan has a dedicated on button

reconfigure_review.title: RF Fan - Review changes

progress.listen_rf_signal: Action "{action}": press and briefly hold the matching button (≤ {timeout}s).

error.light_code_required: Provide at least one light code (on/off or toggle).
error.required_esphome_device: Several compatible ESPHome devices were found. Choose one.
error.unknown_esphome_device: No compatible ESPHome device was found with this name.
error.learn_timeout: No RF signal was captured in time. You can retry, paste the code manually, or skip this action.

gateway_service_missing.message: The ESPHome gateway "{device}" does not expose the RF transmit service ({service}). Check that the gateway is online and that its configuration still includes the transmit_rf_fan service.

transmit_failed.message: Failed to send the RF command "{action}" via the ESPHome gateway "{device}": {error}
